GENERIC.ERROR_LABEL: There was an error processing your request. Please try again later.

VALIDATION.NO_START_END_WHITESPACE: This field cannot start or end with whitespace.
VALIDATION.MIN_LENGTH: This field has to be at least {minLength} characters long.
VALIDATION.MAX_LENGTH: This field has to be maximum {maxLength} characters long.
VALIDATION.VERIFY_PASSWORD: Verify password must match the password.

IP_ADDRESS.ILLEGAL: This IP address is from a disallowed range.

AUTH.WRONG_PASSWORD_LABEL: The provided old password is not correct.

ERRORS.USERNAME_TAKEN: This username was already taken by another user.
ERRORS.EMAIL_TAKEN: This email was already taken by another user.
ERRORS.CREDENTIALS_WRONG: Provided username or password is not correct.

CHANGE_DIALOG.TITLE: Change language
CHANGE_DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: Choose language to use in application. This change should be reflected almost instantly.

PROJECTS.LIST_EMPTY: There are no projects available! You can create one by clicking "Create project" button.

ORACLE.LABEL: Oracle Database Connection Properties
ORACLE.HOST_HINT: Host must be a valid IPv4 or IPv6 address.

CONNECTION_ERROR.CONNECTION_FAILURE: There was an error trying to connect to the project database.
CONNECTION_ERROR.TIMEOUT: Connection to project database has timed out.
CONNECTION_ERROR.INTEGRITY_VIOLATION: The operation could not be completed due to a violation of database integrity rules.
CONNECTION_ERROR.PERMISSION_DENIED: Project database user does not have the required permissions.
CONNECTION_ERROR.UNKNOWN: An unknown error occurred while trying to connect to the project database.

PROJECTS.DELETE_CONFIRM_DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete this project? This is irreversible!

COLLABORATORS.LABEL: Collaborators
COLLABORATORS.ADD_DESCRIPTION: Add collaborator to grant access to project to a specific user.
COLLABORATORS.ALREADY_COLLABORATOR_ERROR: This user is already a collaborator.
COLLABORATORS.USER_NOT_EXISTS_ERROR: The provided user does not exist.
COLLABORATORS.CHANGE_ROLE_DESCRIPTION: Change role of an existing collaborator.
COLLABORATORS.DELETE_DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to remove this collaborator?

TABLES.LABEL: Table
TABLES.NOT_FOUND_LABEL: The provided table does not exist in this project.

DIALOG.TITLE: Set column unused
DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: Sets the column as unused. Unused columns allow for deletion of columns without modifying data at the block level. This space should be reclaimed later by dropping the unused columns manually.
DIALOG.REFERENCED_BY_TABLES_ALERT_HTML:
This column is referenced by foreign keys in other tables.
These tables are:{listHtml}Please remove mentioned relationships or use the cascade constraints option.
DIALOG.USED_IN_MULTI_COLUMN_CONSTRAINTS_ALERT_H:
This column is referenced in a multi-column constraint of this table.
These constraints are:{listHtml}Please remove mentioned constraints or use the cascade constraints option.
DIALOG.PREVIEW_EDITOR_LOAD_ERROR: There was an error trying to load the preview editor.
DIALOG.PREVIEW_GENERATE_ERROR: There was an error trying to generate preview SQL.

CONSTRAINTS.LABEL: Constraints
CONSTRAINTS.EMPTY_LABEL: This table has no supported constraints.

INDEXES.LABEL: Indexes
INDEXES.EMPTY_LABEL: This table has no supported indexes.

RELATIONSHIPS.LABEL: Relationships
RELATIONSHIPS.SELECTION_DESCRIPTION: Selected tables will be added to the diagram including directly related tables.
RELATIONSHIPS.SELECTION_NOT_FOUND: The selected tables were not found.

PROFILE.LABEL: Profile
PROFILE.PICTURE_BAD_ERROR: The provided picture is not valid. General information were updated successfully.
PROFILE.PICTURE_UNKNOWN_ERROR: There was an error while uploading profile picture. General information were updated successfully.
PROFILE.PICTURE_TOO_LARGE_DESCRIPTION: The provided picture is too large. Maximum allowed file size is 2MB.
PROFILE.DISALLOWED_MIME_TYPE_DESCRIPTION: The provided type is not an allowed picture. Please use .png or .jpeg files.
PROFILE.DELETE_ACCOUNT_CONFIRM_DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible. All projects that you own will be deleted as well.

HELP.LABEL: Help
HELP.FAQ_EMPTY_LABEL: There are currently no frequently asked questions available.

DIAGRAM.FULLSCREEN_UNAVAILABLE_LABEL: Fullscreen is not available on your browser.

DIALOG.TITLE: Export as Image
DIALOG.DESCRIPTION: Export the current state of the diagram as an image. PNG and JPEG formats are supported.

FAQ.CREATE_DESCRIPTION: Create a new frequently asked question. This question will be displayed only for the selected locale.
FAQ.UPDATE_DESCRIPTION: Update an existing frequently asked question. This question will be displayed only for the shown locale.
FAQ.CONFIRM_DELETE_DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete this frequently asked question?

DATA_MODEL.LIST_EMPTY: There are no models available! You can create one by clicking "Create model" button.
DATA_MODEL.DELETE_CONFIRM_DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete this model?

DATA_TYPE.DELETE_TITLE: Are you sure want to delete this data type?

LOGICAL.IN_USE: This data type is still used by an attribute!

PHYSICAL.IN_USE: This data type is still used by a column!

LOGICAL.DELETE_DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete this entity? This will delete all attributes and relationships associated with it.
LOGICAL.DELETE_FIELD_DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete this attribute?

PHYSICAL.DELETE_DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete this table? This will delete all columns and relationships associated with it.
PHYSICAL.DELETE_FIELD_DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete this column?

LOGICAL.EMPTY_LABEL: This entity does not contain any attributes.

PHYSICAL.EMPTY_LABEL: This table does not contain any columns.

LOGICAL.TITLE: Remove Entity from Diagram
LOGICAL.DESCRIPTION: The entity will be removed from this diagram. It will remain available in the data model and can be added to other diagrams.
LOGICAL.DELETE_FROM_MODEL_LABEL: Permanently delete this entity from the data model (removes all of its attributes and relationships)

PHYSICAL.TITLE: Remove Table from Diagram
PHYSICAL.DESCRIPTION: The table will be removed from this diagram. It will remain available in the data model and can be added to other diagrams.
PHYSICAL.DELETE_FROM_MODEL_LABEL: Permanently delete this table from the data model (removes all of its columns and relationships)

LOGICAL.TITLE: Delete Relationship
LOGICAL.DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this relationship from the data model?

PHYSICAL.TITLE: Delete Relationship
PHYSICAL.DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to permanently delete this relationship from the data model?

DELETE_DIAGRAM.TITLE: Delete Diagram
DELETE_DIAGRAM.DESCRIPTION: Are you sure you want to delete this diagram?

UNSAVED_CHANGES.TITLE: Unsaved Changes
UNSAVED_CHANGES.DESCRIPTION: You have unsaved layout changes. Are you sure you want to leave?

INVALID_PROPERTIES.TITLE: Invalid Properties
INVALID_PROPERTIES.DESCRIPTION: Please fix validation errors before continuing.
